Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our Saturday send for paid readers, we typically round up 11 of the best.
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
Why are these interesting?
The Soundtracks of Our Lives [ https://substack.com/redirect/db3deaf7-f9c4-4545-a5f6-50358aefc760?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (The Signal)
An exhaustive love letter to what film soundtracks can mean to us, that still ends too soon. 
What Did Roman Emperors Do All Day? [ https://substack.com/redirect/2098c78c-3dfc-46f9-b15a-91649e94e639?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Law and Liberty)
Great question, answered by the best.
This Clip from ‘Charlie Wilson’s War’ [ https://substack.com/redirect/b01216ad-166e-4538-b08e-a767e0fe2df9?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (YouTube)
We’ll see. Always, we’ll see...
